texto: With the new technology that keeps entering the media, film composers are constantly being placed in new learning situations. Acknowledging this and realizing that one must keep up, I maintain, nonetheless, that the real creative power is in the mind and heart of the composer.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Henry Mancini sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “With the new technology that keeps entering the media, film composers are constantly being placed…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, composer, music, útil em momentos de music.
